MajesticEmpireRule.Rule1: Majestic Empire is a 5 by 6 symbols combination video slot (with an additional reel of 5 symbols) featuring big symbols and increasing multiplier.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{20} and %{400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways - 46656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

MajesticEmpireRule.Rule3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the “Paytable” multiplied by bet size and bet level.
MajesticEmpireRule.Rule4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

MajesticEmpireShared.PayoutDesc1: At every spin, any combinations of 8 or more matching symbols appearing anywhere on the reels will result in a winning combination.
MajesticEmpireShared.PayoutDesc2: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.
MajesticEmpireShared.PayoutDesc3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
MajesticEmpireShared.PayoutDesc4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
MajesticEmpireShared.PayoutDesc5: Some symbols may occupy 2x1 (in the additional reel on top of the 5 by 6 reels) and 2x2 (in the 5 by 6 reels) of symbol spaces and each of these symbols will represent as 1 symbol during payout calculations.
MajesticEmpireShared.PayoutDesc6: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
MajesticEmpireShared.PayoutDesc7: Wild symbol appears in the additional reel on top of the 5 by 6 reels only.
MajesticEmpireShared.PayoutDesc8: Scatter symbol appears in the 5 by 6 reels only.
MajesticEmpireShared.BigSymbolDesc1: During any spin, big symbols in the size of 2x2 may appear on the 5 by 6 reels.
MajesticEmpireShared.BigSymbolDesc2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any big symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) and then split into 4 same symbols.
MajesticEmpireShared.MultiplierDesc1: At the start of any main game spin, the multiplier is x1.
MajesticEmpireShared.MultiplierDesc2: During any spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the multiplier will be increased by 1.
MajesticEmpireShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
MajesticEmpireShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the multiplier is x2.
MajesticEmpireShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the multiplier will be increased by 2.
MajesticEmpireShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc4: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 5 more free spins.
MajesticEmpireShared.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
MajesticEmpireShared.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
